title: Homeworld Remastered Collection

notes: Like others I had to use the script at https://steamcommunity.com/app/244160/discussions/0/2727382174641131600 - but first I had to update all references from ${HOME}/.steam and ${HOME}/.local/share/Steam to my steam's "real" path where I install my games (in my case:/games/steam), but also I had to use my wine already installed in the distro to initially run the game and install Mono: WINEPREFIX=/games/steam/steamapps/compatdata/244160/pfx wine64 /games/steam/steamapps/Homeworld/HomeworldRM/Bin/Release/HomeworldRM.exe -dlccampaign HW1Campaign.big -campaign HomeworldClassic -moviepath DataHW1Campaign - after that (it installed mono) it went back to the prompt, but then I ran it again and it worked VIA WINE (wine staging 4.9), but not via proton :-(
title: Homeworld Remastered Collection

notes: Running with a new script, from https://git.sr.ht/~_dev_fra/hwrc-proton-launcher . Tested: classic and remastered games; Steam achievements. Untested: multiplayer. Issues: remastered games crash, textures have to be set to medium or below; games get stuck on exit, need to be manually terminated.
title: Homeworld Remastered Collection

notes: Used the launcher https://git.sr.ht/~_dev_fra/hwrc-proton-launcher. Tested training and some levels with all the games, graphics settings on max, no crash occurred. Games do not quit on exit, processes have to be terminated manually. Rated silver because of the usage of the alternative launcher and the issue on quit, otherwise would have been platinum.
title: Homeworld Remastered Collection

notes:
Using https://git.sr.ht/~_dev_fra/hwrc-proton-launcher
First run without it. Then edit the paths in the hwrc-proton-launcher.
Launch homeworld classic 1 in windowed mode using the script.
Set largest available display size in the game.
Exit game, relaunch in full screen mode.
Seems to work - played up to training mission 7. Sounds work. Exiting the game works. 3D movement (z axis) with the mouse feels slightly off or unresponsive.

title: Homeworld Remastered Collection

notes: The two scripts https://git.sr.ht/~_dev_fra/hwrc-proton-launcher and https://steamcommunity.com/app/244160/discussions/0/2727382174641131600 did not work out of the box for me. hwrc-proton-launcher would give me an error message dialog saying "OpenGL Failed to Load" that I wan't able to get rid of. The steamcommunity script would exit without output. After som experimentation I found that I had to hard-code Proton\ 3.16 to PROTON_PATH in the steamcommunity script. The game would start, but the rendering resolution would be larger than my monitor, so I could only see the lower left corner of the screen. I added -windowed to GAME_OPT for 1|rm1|r1 and then tried again. I did then get a functional 1920x1080 window. From there I could change the in-game settings to 2560x1600 and enable fullscreen, quit the game, remove -windowed from the launcher script, and the game would remember by in-game settings and I now have a functional main menu. YAY!. Next step is to try and start the actual game.
